intro: Fly forward and save your swarm in THE LAST LADYBUG - a rail shooter set in a colorful world where the skies are ruled by mechanical monsters and the lands are scorched by destruction!
description:
"Fly forward. Choose your path. Save your swarm. You are THE LAST LADYBUG!

In a world where the skies are ruled by mechanical monsters and the lands are scorched by destruction, only one brave soul remains: THE LAST LADYBUG, the humanoid heroine with wings of steel and a heart of fire. Fly forward and save your swarm in this action packed rail shooter!

FLY FORWARD - Fly and blast your way through a colorful 3D world ravaged by a mechanical threat. THE LAST LADYBUG features 15 stunning stages of blistering action and neon chaos!

CHOOSE YOUR PATH - Branching paths at the end of each stage send you soaring toward different zones. Each route leads to a new challenge and a new chance to rescue your imprisoned bug brethren!

FACE THE ENEMY - After fighting your way through waves of enemies, you'll fly into pulse pounding boss fights that'll leave your trigger finger tingling!

The fate of bugkind is in your hands. Stretch those wings and dive headfirst into an electrifying pixelated adventure! This is THE LAST LADYBUG!"
